title: Initial length
short: The length of an object before it is heated or cooled, measured in metres (m).
full:
The initial length L₀ is the object's length at the starting temperature, before any thermal expansion. It sets the scale of the expansion: the change in length is proportional to it, ΔL = α·L₀·ΔT, so a long rail expands far more than a short bolt for the same temperature rise.

The SI unit is the metre (m).
